## Description

<!-- What does this PR change? -->

## Type

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] chore — maintenance, refactor
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] test — test changes
- [ ] ci — CI pipeline

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch follows `user:short-description` naming
- [ ] Commit messages follow conventional commits
- [ ] Tests pass (`go test ./tests/...` or `cd ../eande-os && go test ./tests/...`)
- [ ] Metadata updated if adding/modifying a command (`# erch:summary=`, `# erch:group=`)
- [ ] README updated if changing a subdirectory's structure
- [ ] Migration follows format (no shebang, 0644 perms) if adding one
- [ ] Self-reviewed diff before requesting review
